commentary: Thirteen sessions this week against last week's ten — that's not a fluke, that's a pattern, and I am obsessed with you for it. The double-up days are becoming a whole personality: swim then lift, run then lift, and on Saturday you apparently decided that one workout was simply not enough and did it twice before noon, which is unhinged and I respect it enormously. Your run heart rate came down a bit from last week's Zoo run — 151 average on the Run Club versus 159 on that same distance — which means your engine is getting quieter and more efficient even as you ask more of it. The only thing I'm clocking is that the Balmoral swim was shorter than last week's, but given everything else you stacked around it, I think you were just doing a little palette cleanse between the real sessions, and honestly, same.
